card.title: Intervention Program
card.description: Specialized support and counseling services designed to help students overcome academic and personal challenges through compassionate guidance.

page.title: Intervention & Support Program
page.subtitle: Comprehensive counseling and psychological support for student wellbeing.

headOfDepartment.name: Benisha Pyngrope
headOfDepartment.quote: Every student deserves support tailored to their unique needs. Through counseling and psychotherapy, we help students overcome challenges and achieve their full potential.

qualifications: Master of Science in Clinical Psychology

subPrograms.title: Academic Support
subPrograms.description: Targeted interventions to help students overcome learning challenges and improve academic performance.

subPrograms.title: Personal Counseling
subPrograms.description: One-on-one sessions to address personal, emotional, and social concerns.

subPrograms.title: Group Therapy
subPrograms.description: Group sessions for peer support and collaborative problem-solving.

subPrograms.title: Family Guidance
subPrograms.description: Support and guidance for families to enhance home-school collaboration.

curriculum.heading: Our Intervention Approach
curriculum.intro: We provide evidence-based psychological interventions and counseling services:

page.ctaSubtext: Our intervention team is here to help students thrive both academically and personally.
